goal: Build approved clean-room examples that teach the local LIT-ISO model the cyan reference-knight palette language across characters, props, items, terrain, VFX, and HUD sprites.

allowed: human-approved Sprixen outputs generated by this project account
broad style references with explicit license/provenance
local ComfyUI outputs generated from our own prompts and references
blocked: copied Sprixen UI, text, branding, or prompts
third-party asset-pack pixels without a license

global_positive_prefix: LIT-ISO original cozy isometric pixel art, cyan-knight-compatible palette, teal-blue accent light, amber warm highlight details, selective dark outline, compact readable silhouette, crisp square pixels, transparent background
global_negative: floor, baked base, diorama, room, scene background, text, watermark, badge, UI frame unless explicitly requested, circular backing, realistic render, smooth painterly blur, anti-aliased haze, duplicate subjects, cropped subject
acceptance: All positive samples must be explicit dashboard approvals with strict QA pass.
Characters, mobs, NPCs, and props use bottom-center anchors.
Items and HUD icons use centered anchors and remain readable at 16px/32px.
Tiles are terrain-only 2:1 diamond sprites with transparent corners and no objects on top.
Cyan/teal style appears as a shared palette/accent language, not the same object copied across categories.
Sprixen or Comfy outputs must re-enter Asset Forge review packs before training.
Human contact-sheet review should reject at least the weakest 15 percent before training.

jobs.prompt: male adventurer knight, teal-blue hooded armor, amber rune details, leather belt pouches, short sword, full body, front-facing isometric stance
female adventurer knight, teal-blue cloak, dark armor plates, amber rune details, travel satchel, full body, front-facing isometric stance
cozy village NPC adventurer variants with subtle teal cloth accents, warm leather and iron gear, full body, readable face, isometric stance
small forest creature companions and harmless mobs with faint teal magical markings, full body, clear silhouette, isometric stance
single isolated workshop or camp prop with cozy wood, iron bands, small cyan paint or crystal accent, no baked ground, bottom-center anchor
single isolated forest resource prop, rock, stump, log, bush, or magical plant, subtle teal-blue accent, no baked ground, bottom-center anchor
single centered tool or small weapon inventory sprite, iron, warm wood, teal-blue crystal accent, no frame, no hand, no floor
single centered crafting material or consumable inventory sprite, cozy fantasy material, tiny teal-blue accent where natural, no frame, no backing
single 2:1 isometric diamond grass or dirt terrain tile, muted forest/plains palette, terrain surface only, no object on top, no raised cube
single 2:1 isometric diamond terrain tile variant for path, stone, shore, shallow water, snow, or magical soil, terrain surface only, no object on top
single centered transparent HUD or VFX sprite, cyan-teal magical spark, slash, harvest puff, health, mana, quest, craft, or coin symbol, no text
